name: AuthenticWatches.com
description: AuthenticWatches.com® specializes in offering Swiss-made luxury watches at competitive prices, ensuring that all products are original and come with a Certificate of Authenticity.

name: Watches of Switzerland.
description: Watches of Switzerland boasts a prestigious collection of luxury pre-owned and vintage watches from renowned Swiss brands, making it a premier destination for watch enthusiasts. With nearly a century of expertise, the company offers personalized shopping experiences and a diverse range of iconic timepieces.

name: Luxury Bazaar/LuxAge Group
description: Luxury Bazaar is a premier online retailer specializing in luxury watches from top brands like Rolex, Patek Philippe, and Audemars Piguet. With over 20 years of experience, the company offers a vast selection of rare and unique pre-owned timepieces, ensuring competitive pricing and exceptional service.

name: Luxury Joint
description: Luxury Joint offers an extensive selection of luxury watches from renowned brands like Rolex, Audemars Piguet, and Patek Philippe, ensuring expert guidance and personalized service for an exceptional shopping experience. Their commitment to authenticity and competitive pricing makes them a top destination for luxury watch enthusiasts in Dubai.

name: Montres Breguet SA
description: Breguet is a renowned manufacturer of luxury watches, specializing in haute horlogerie and fine watchmaking. Their timepieces are distinguished by innovative technical complications and refined aesthetics, solidifying Breguet's reputation in the luxury goods sector.

name: Art Of Time India
description: Art of Time is dedicated to being the preferred retailer for luxury watch buyers, offering a curated selection of the finest timepieces and exemplary customer service. With a focus on creating a personalized and transparent shopping experience, they provide various services, including in-boutique and online shopping, making luxury watches accessible and approachable for enthusiasts.

name: Chopard
description: Chopard is a renowned manufacturer of luxury watches, offering a diverse range that includes contemporary sports watches and intricate mechanical timepieces. The company's commitment to artisanal skills and ethical practices enhances its reputation in the high-end watch market.

name: CRM Jewelers
description: CRM Jewelers is a luxury watch and jewelry boutique in Miami, Florida, specializing in secondhand watches from prestigious brands like Rolex, AP, Hublot, Richard Mille, and Patek Philippe.

name: Hussein Bakry Gazzaz & Co
description: Hussein Bakry Gazzaz & Co is a prominent luxury retailer in Jeddah, Saudi Arabia, specializing in a variety of luxury products, including luxury Swiss-made ladies' watches.

name: Manufacture Roger Dubuis
description: Roger Dubuis specializes in high-quality luxury watches, known for its innovative design and exceptional craftsmanship that appeals to both connoisseurs and non-conformists. The company's commitment to haute horlogerie ensures that its timepieces embody the hallmark of Geneva, making it a key player in the luxury watch market.
